home.title: Vitorra Holdings Limited — Fuel, Logistics, Healthcare & Coffee
home.description: Vitorra is a diversified company providing Fuel Eco Tech, logistics, SEAL Wound Spray, and premium Ugandan coffee across Uganda and East Africa.

about.title: About — Vitorra Holdings Limited
about.description: Vitorra Holdings Limited is a diversified holdings company built in Uganda — operating across fuel technology, healthcare, premium coffee, and logistics. Meet our leadership team and learn what drives us.

contact.title: Contact Us — Vitorra Holdings Limited
contact.description: Get in touch with Vitorra Holdings Limited in Kampala, Uganda — email support@vitorra.org, call +256 740 026 118, or send us a message. We reply within 24 hours.

fet.title: Fuel Eco Tech — Proven Fuel Savings for Fleets
fet.description: Fuel Eco Tech is validated fuel-saving technology for commercial fleets across East Africa — lower fuel costs, extended engine life, and reduced emissions. Request a fuel savings assessment.

seal.title: SEAL Wound Spray — FDA-Cleared Hemostatic Bleeding Control
seal.description: SEAL is an FDA-cleared, chitosan-based hemostatic spray for rapid bleeding control — for EMS, military, hospitals, home, and pet first aid. Single-use, sterile, MIL-STD-810H tested. Request product information.

coffee.title: Vitorra Coffee — Premium Single-Origin Ugandan Coffee
coffee.description: Vitorra Coffee — traceable, single-origin 100% Arabica from Mount Elgon, Uganda. Shop retail, stock your business wholesale, or source at export volumes.

logistics.title: Logistics Services — Freight, Warehousing & Supply Chain
logistics.description: Vitorra Logistics — end-to-end freight, shipping & freight forwarding, warehousing, customs clearance, and supply chain management across Uganda and East Africa. Request a logistics quote.

enquire.title: Request a Quote — Vitorra Holdings Limited
enquire.description: Request a quote or enquiry from Vitorra Holdings — Fuel Eco Tech, SEAL wound spray, premium Ugandan coffee, or logistics. Our team replies within 24 hours.

trust.title: Certifications & Trust — Vitorra Holdings Limited
trust.description: Vitorra Holdings is a registered Ugandan company (URSB). Every product line is backed by certification, validation, or documentation — available on request.

why.body: From fuel efficiency to emergency medicine, premium coffee to end-to-end logistics — Vitorra serves businesses that demand proven performance, not promises.
why.point1Body: Every FET installation is benchmarked before and after — so the savings are in data, not marketing copy.
why.point2Body: ISO 9001 · 14001 · 27001, Zurich-insured, AVL-validated. Our products carry independent international certification.
why.point3Body: Serving Uganda and six markets across the region — with the infrastructure and local knowledge to grow alongside you.

finalCta.body: Whether you need a fuel savings assessment, a logistics quote, or premium Ugandan coffee — our team responds within 24 hours.
finalCta.caption: Uganda · East Africa · International  ·  Typical reply within 24 hours

certCard.body: Vitorra Holdings Limited is a registered Ugandan company, backed by verified certifications, lab results, and third-party validations across every product line.

team.teaserBody: A company is only as strong as its people — led by Solomon Okello, with a team spanning operations, finance, marketing, and technology.

mission.title: One conviction.
mission.body1: East Africa deserves access to the same quality of technology, healthcare products, and business services available anywhere in the world.
mission.body2: Vitorra exists to deliver exactly that — with the rigour, certifications, and integrity that serious buyers and partners demand.
mission.quote: Innovative products and dependable solutions — across fuel technology, healthcare, premium coffee, and logistics — for businesses and consumers across Uganda, East Africa, and international markets.

whoWeAre.body1: Vitorra Holdings Limited is registered in Uganda and operates across fuel technology, healthcare, premium coffee, and logistics — bringing international-standard products to East African markets, and East African products to the world.
whoWeAre.body2: Every product line is held to the same standard: independently certified, evidenced by data, and delivered with integrity. We serve B2B clients across Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, Rwanda, and international markets — with a 24-hour response commitment on every enquiry.

values.value1Body: We say what we mean and deliver what we promise — every product, every partner, every time. No fine print, no surprises.
values.value2Body: From fuel savings to food safety, our claims are backed by data, independent certification, and third-party validation. We do not self-certify.
values.value3Body: International execution standards paired with deep local knowledge — competitive at home, credible across every border we operate in.

statementBand.body: One diversified company behind fuel technology, healthcare, premium coffee, and logistics — engineered to a global standard, grounded in East Africa.

fetPage.heroBody: Validated fuel-saving technology trusted by fleet operators across East Africa — cutting fuel costs and extending engine life, with a return you can measure.
fetPage.benefit1Body: Reduce diesel and petrol consumption across your fleet — directly improving your bottom line.
fetPage.benefit2Body: A cleaner, more complete burn means less build-up and wear on critical engine components.
fetPage.benefit3Body: Burning fuel more efficiently lowers harmful exhaust output — better for compliance and the environment.
fetPage.benefit4Body: We benchmark your consumption before and after, so the savings are visible — not guesswork.
fetPage.scienceBody: FET improves the turbulence and distribution of the air-fuel mixture in the combustion chamber — so oxygen is used more fully on every cycle.
fetPage.withoutFet1: Incomplete combustion — fuel is wasted on every cycle
fetPage.withoutFet2: Excess CO₂, NOx, and soot particles in exhaust gases
fetPage.withoutFet3: Deposits accumulate inside the engine over time
fetPage.withoutFet4: Higher fuel spend for the same kilometres driven
fetPage.withFet1: Patented swirl chamber ensures full oxygen integration
fetPage.withFet2: Cleaner, more complete burn on every combustion cycle
fetPage.withFet3: Fewer deposits — less wear on engine components
fetPage.withFet4: Measurable reduction in fuel consumption and emissions
fetPage.step1Body: FET integrates between the fuel pump and fuel filter — outside the high-pressure system. No modification to your engine, injection system, or electronics. Fitted in under an hour.
fetPage.step2Body: The proprietary swirl chamber system improves the turbulence and distribution of the air-fuel mixture in the combustion chamber. Oxygen integrates more fully — so every cycle burns cleaner and more completely.
fetPage.step3Body: We establish your baseline consumption, then track the difference after fitting — giving you a clear, data-backed return on investment.
fetPage.resultsSubtitle: Independent test data from a signed official report — real vehicle, real conditions, verified results.
fetPage.bigNumberCaption: fuel consumption reduction — first full month after installation.
fetPage.vehicleLine: VW T5 · Landesbaubehörde Stadthagen, Germany · Tested January–October 2025 under standard service conditions.
fetPage.savingCallout: ↓ 1.60 l/100 km saved · 13,468 km verified baseline
fetPage.finding1: No further limp-mode incidents across the entire test period
fetPage.finding2: EGR and DPF blockages eliminated completely after installation
fetPage.finding3: Smoother, more stable engine behaviour throughout
fetPage.finding4: 13.9% reduction is well above normal operational variation (±3–5%)
fetPage.attribution: Report prepared by CTI GmbH & Landesbaubehörde Hameln · Signed by Holger Walprecht · 10 November 2025
fetPage.noModTitle: No modification to your engine. Ever.
fetPage.noModBody: FET is a physical optimisation — it improves how fuel enters the combustion process without touching your engine, electronics, or factory systems. Your vehicle leaves our team exactly as it arrived.
fetPage.noMod1Body: FET works exclusively on fuel preparation and swirling. It does not intervene in the combustion engine, control electronics, or exhaust aftertreatment system.
fetPage.noMod2Body: Installation is carried out outside the high-pressure fuel system. No changes to your injection system or engine components are necessary.
fetPage.noMod3Body: FET does not change the chemical composition of your fuel or alter the way your engine works. It is a physical optimisation only.
fetPage.noMod4Body: The system improves combustion efficiency without any mechanical or electronic intervention in your factory-set systems. Your vehicle warranty is not affected.
fetPage.certsBody: FET carries internationally recognised certifications and has been independently validated by AVL Technologies — one of the world's foremost automotive engineering institutions.
fetPage.cert1Body: Manufactured under internationally recognised quality management standards — every unit produced to a consistent, verified specification.
fetPage.cert2Body: Committed to reducing environmental impact throughout production and operation — aligned with the emissions reduction story FET delivers.
fetPage.cert3Body: Business operations and customer data managed to international security standards — a hallmark of a serious, established organisation.
fetPage.cert4Body: Backed by Zurich product liability cover. An independent insurer has assessed and underwritten the product — a strong third-party quality signal.
fetPage.cert5Body: Performance independently validated by AVL Technologies — one of the world's foremost automotive engineering and testing institutions.
fetPage.cert6Body: Independently certified by qm-solutions GmbH, Germany — confirming the product meets rigorous European quality and compliance standards.
fetPage.faq1Q: What vehicles is Fuel Eco Tech suitable for?
fetPage.faq1A: Petrol and diesel engines right across the range — from small cars, mini-buses, and vans, through SUVs and light trucks, up to heavy long-haul trucks of 40 tonnes. Four device sizes cover every class; we confirm the exact fit for your specific vehicles during your free assessment.
fetPage.faq2Q: Do I need to modify my engine?
fetPage.faq2A: No. Fuel Eco Tech works outside the high-pressure fuel system — no changes to your engine, injection system, or electronics. Your factory configuration stays completely intact.
fetPage.faq3Q: Will this affect my vehicle warranty?
fetPage.faq3A: No. Because FET does not modify your engine or any factory-set components, your manufacturer warranty is not affected. It is a physical optimisation of the fuel preparation process only.
fetPage.faq4Q: How do you prove the savings?
fetPage.faq4A: We establish your current fuel consumption as a baseline, then measure consumption after fitting — so the difference is transparent and tied to real data from your fleet.
fetPage.faq5Q: Is there a minimum fleet size?
fetPage.faq5A: No. Fuel Eco Tech works for a single vehicle or an entire fleet. Larger fleets simply see the savings multiply across every vehicle.
fetPage.faq6A: Request a fuel savings assessment. We'll review your fleet, fuel usage, and goals, then come back with tailored options and expected outcomes — at no obligation.
fetPage.finalCtaBody: Book a no-obligation fuel savings assessment. We'll review your fleet and come back with tailored options and expected results.
fetPage.finalCtaCaption: No obligation  ·  Tailored to your fleet  ·  Reply within 24 hours

suv.label: SUV / Large car
suv.examples: Tiguan, RAV4, X5, GLE, Sprinter vans

fetPricing.body: Four models cover everything from a compact car to a heavy-goods truck. Each price is landed in Kampala and includes professional installation — your tailored quote is confirmed after a free assessment.
fetPricing.footnote: Larger fleets qualify for volume pricing, applied at the quote stage. Prices are shown in euro (EUR); your quote can be issued in your preferred currency.

fetCalculator.title: How much could your fleet save?
fetCalculator.body: Enter your vehicles and usage to see an estimated annual fuel saving, payback period, and CO₂ avoided. Your real figures are confirmed in a free assessment.
fetCalculator.disclaimer: Estimates based on field and lab test data. Actual savings vary by vehicle condition and driving pattern.
fetCalculator.enquiryMessage: I'd like a Fuel Eco Tech quote for {fleetText} ({model}). Based on the savings calculator — {km} km/year per vehicle at €{price}/L and {pct}% expected savings — the estimated annual saving is {saving} (≈ {co2} CO₂ avoided) with a payback of ~{payback}. Please send tailored options.

sealPage.heroEyebrow: SEAL Hemostatic Wound Spray · Medical · B2B
sealPage.heroBody: An FDA-cleared, chitosan-based hemostatic spray for rapid bleeding control — trusted by EMS, military, and emergency teams, and ready for the home, the field, and even the family pet.
sealPage.benefit1Body: Chitosan binds to blood cells and platelets to form a fast, stable clot over the wound — sealing cuts, lacerations, and serious bleeds.
sealPage.benefit2Body: Cleared by the US FDA (510(k)) — confirmed substantially equivalent to an established, safe, and effective medical device.
sealPage.benefit3Body: Every can is sealed, sterile, and single-use — no preparation, no cross-contamination, ready the moment you are.
sealPage.benefit4Body: Tested to MIL-STD-810H for heat, cold, altitude, and humidity — performs in rain, snow, wind, and low-light conditions.
sealPage.step1Body: Give it a good shake to activate the formula.
sealPage.step2Body: Hold 6–10 inches away and apply a steady spray to fully cover the bleeding area.
sealPage.step3Body: Chitosan binds to blood cells and platelets, forming a fast, stable clot.
sealPage.step4Body: For deeper or more serious wounds, follow up with professional medical attention.
sealPage.rangeBody: The same chitosan hemostatic technology, packaged for everyday carry, professional response, and animal first aid.
sealPage.v1Body: Compact enough for hiking kits, travel bags, and home medicine cabinets — bleeding control wherever life happens.
sealPage.v2Body: A patented, higher-velocity formula for first responders and tactical teams — rapid control of moderate to severe external hemorrhage.
sealPage.v3Body: Sting-free bleeding control for dogs, cats, horses, goats, and more — stops bleeding from cuts, abrasions, and nail injuries.
sealPage.rangeFootText: Not sure which format fits your team?
sealPage.rangeFootSuffix: — we'll recommend the right one for your use and volumes.
sealPage.mediaText: In the kit. On the line. In seconds.
sealPage.trustBody: FDA-cleared, field-deployed, and tested to military environmental standards — SEAL is built to perform when it matters most.
sealPage.trust1Body: Cleared through the US FDA 510(k) process — the pathway confirming a moderate-risk device is substantially equivalent to an established, safe, and effective product.
sealPage.trust2Body: Deployed in Emergency Medical Services, military, and tactical operations — and approved for use by agencies including Maryland EMS.
sealPage.trust3Body: Tested in animal models with both normal and impaired clotting function. Always monitor patients post-application.
sealPage.trust4Body: Meets MIL-STD-810H standards for temperature, altitude, and humidity — performs in rain, snow, wind, and low light.
sealPage.trust5Body: A sterile chitosan dry-powder formula — a naturally derived agent widely used in modern hemostatic dressings.
sealPage.trust6Body: Manufactured in the United States and backed by the FDA clearance process.
sealPage.spec6Value: Rinse with saline or water, wipe with sterile gauze
sealPage.safety1: Not a replacement for a tourniquet — but it can reduce reliance on one, especially where a tourniquet can't be applied (neck, groin, or underarm).
sealPage.safety2: Single-patient use. Once a can is activated the sterile seal is broken; use it on one person only. It may be used on multiple wounds on the same patient.
sealPage.safety3: For deeper or more serious wounds, always seek professional medical attention.
sealPage.safetyFoot: Full regulatory, clinical, and usage documentation is provided with every procurement enquiry.
sealPage.faq1A: SEAL is an FDA-cleared, chitosan-based hemostatic aerosol designed for rapid bleeding control. It forms a gel-like clot over minor cuts and lacerations as well as more serious bleeds, for professional, home, and field first aid.
sealPage.faq2A: Shake the can, then spray from 6–10 inches to cover the bleeding area. The chitosan binds to blood cells and platelets, forming a fast, stable clot. For deeper wounds, follow up with professional care.
sealPage.faq3A: SEAL is cleared by the US FDA through the 510(k) process and tested to MIL-STD-810H. Our team provides the full regulatory, clinical, and compliance documentation for your market and procurement process on request.
sealPage.faq4A: Three: SEAL OTC for everyday and home use, SEAL PRO for first responders and tactical teams, and HemoSEAL Pet for animal first aid. We'll help you choose the right format and volumes.
sealPage.faq5A: No. SEAL does not replace a tourniquet, but it can reduce reliance on one — particularly in areas where a tourniquet can't be applied, such as the neck, groin, or underarm. Always seek care for serious wounds.
sealPage.faq6Q: How is it stored, and how long does it last?
sealPage.faq6A: Each unit has a 36-month shelf life and is stored at room temperature with no refrigeration required — making it well suited to trauma kits, ambulances, clinics, and field packs.
sealPage.faq7Q: Can I order at procurement volumes?
sealPage.faq7A: Yes. We support institutional and bulk procurement for hospitals, responders, NGOs, and defence. Request product information and our team will share pricing, documentation, and supply options for your volumes.
sealPage.finalCtaBody: Request product information and our team will share specifications, certifications, and procurement options — within 24 hours.
sealPage.finalCtaCaption: FDA-cleared  ·  Single-use & sterile  ·  Reply within 24 hours

coffeePage.benefit1Body: Grown on the rich highland slopes of Mount Elgon, Uganda.

coffeePage.ftcStep1Body: Hand-tended on highland farms around Mount Elgon, Uganda.

coffeePage.exportBody: Source traceable Ugandan coffee at volume.
coffeePage.faq1A: It's single-origin 100% Arabica, grown on the highland slopes of Mount Elgon in eastern Uganda, then washed, sun-dried, and roasted in Uganda.
coffeePage.faq2Q: Can I buy wholesale for my café?
coffeePage.faq2A: Yes. We supply cafés, hotels, restaurants, and retailers. Enquire for wholesale pricing and regular supply options.
coffeePage.faq3A: Yes. We supply traceable Ugandan coffee to international importers and roasters. Enquire for export volumes, pricing, and documentation.
coffeePage.faq4A: Every bag carries a QR code that traces your coffee back to its source, and we provide origin and process documentation on request.
coffeePage.faq5A: Our GOLD medium roast is smooth and balanced with caramel notes — washed and sun-dried for a clean, rounded cup.
coffeePage.finalCtaBody: Shop retail packs, stock your business, or source at export volumes — our team replies within 24 hours.
coffeePage.finalCtaCaption: Single origin  ·  Traceable  ·  Reply within 24 hours

logisticsPage.heroBody: End-to-end freight, warehousing, customs clearance, and supply-chain management across Uganda, East Africa, and beyond.
logisticsPage.benefit1Body: Freight, warehousing, customs, and supply-chain — handled by one partner.
logisticsPage.benefit2Body: Across Uganda, East Africa, and international trade corridors.
logisticsPage.benefit3Body: Track shipments and stock from dispatch through to delivery.
logisticsPage.benefit4Body: Your goods handled with care and delivered on schedule, every time.
logisticsPage.cap1Body: Road, sea, and air freight — moving your goods reliably across borders.
logisticsPage.cap2Body: Secure storage, inventory management, and order fulfilment.
logisticsPage.cap3Body: Documentation and clearance handled — no delays at the border.
logisticsPage.cap3Alt: Customs clearance at a container port
logisticsPage.cap4Body: End-to-end coordination and visibility, from origin to destination.
logisticsPage.faqRoute: Have a specific route in mind?
logisticsPage.faq1Q: What logistics services do you offer?
logisticsPage.faq1A: Road, sea, and air freight; secure warehousing and fulfilment; customs clearance and documentation; and full supply-chain management — end to end.
logisticsPage.faq2A: We move goods within Uganda, across East Africa, and through international trade corridors. Tell us your route and we'll confirm the best option.
logisticsPage.faq3A: Yes. We manage the documentation and clearance process so your goods keep moving without delays at the border.
logisticsPage.faq4A: Yes. We provide visibility from dispatch through to delivery, so you always know where your goods are.
logisticsPage.faq5Q: How do I get a quote?
logisticsPage.faq5A: Request a logistics quote with your origin, destination, and cargo details. Our team replies within 24 hours with tailored options.
logisticsPage.finalCtaBody: Tell us your route and cargo, and we'll come back with a tailored logistics quote — within 24 hours.
